" affiliation order "m eans an order declaring a man to be the tion
father of a child identified in the order;
" attachment of earnings order"m eans an order under section
twenty-five;
" child " means a person below the age of eighteen years,
whether a marital or non-marital child;
· court" means a subordinate court or the High Court;
"custodian"m eans a person appointed under this Act or any
other law to be the guardian of a child;
"defendant", in relation to a maintenance order or a related
attachment of earnings order, means the person liable to
make payments under that order;
